test_cases.description: Verifies the skill enforces writing a failing test BEFORE writing any production code
test_cases.input: I already wrote the implementation for my retry function. Can I just write the tests now to verify it works?

test_cases.description: Verifies the skill mandates watching a test fail before writing implementation
test_cases.input: I wrote a test. Can I skip running it and just go directly to the implementation?

test_cases.description: Verifies the skill requires writing only minimal code to pass the test, not over-engineering
test_cases.input: My test is passing. Should I add configurable retry options, exponential backoff, and a callback hook while I'm at it?
